criteria.criterion: tests/unit/metrics/test_sidecar_metrics.py passes: a gate_error_v1 ERROR row paired with a later PASS on the same ticket yields a diagnosis-interval duration equal to the fixture timestamp delta (assert dur == expected).

citation.description: test_cost_per_accepted_change_from_review_metrics asserts ==9.0; test_zero_accepted_returns_none in heldout (lines 91-97) asserts is None

criteria.criterion: cost_per_accepted_change over a fixture of 3 REVIEW_RESULT runs summing llm_calls==9 with exactly 1 completion_verifier_pass_v1 returns 9; a fixture with 0 accepted closes returns None (→ Unavailable, no ZeroDivisionError) — both asserted.

The cost derivations read llm_calls ONLY from REVIEW_RESULT.metrics (never from COMPLETION_VERDICT, which has none) — asserted by a fixture whose COMPLETION_VERDICT records carry no metrics yet cost is still computed from the REVIEW_RESULT runs.

first_pass_verification over a fixture of 3 tickets where 2 have their EARLIEST COMPLETION_VERDICT record as completion_verifier_pass_v1 and 1 has an earliest completion_verifier_fail_v1 returns 2/3 — asserted numerically.

env_diagnosis_interval pairs a gate_error_v1 ERROR (gate=plan_review) with the next plan_review PASS and NOT with an interleaved completion PASS on the same streams — asserted (proves the gate-field match).

citation.description: test_sidecar_metrics_registered_authoritative checks REGISTRY for source='sidecar' and is_authoritative; register() is called at module load (sidecar_metrics.py:292) with source='sidecar' (line 272); __init__.py imports sidecar_metrics triggering registration

criteria.criterion: The metrics register into src/rebar/metrics/registry.py with source='sidecar' (authoritative) — asserted.
